name: family_checkin
body_text: Hi {{1}}, the {{2}} arrived and works well. Thanks for sorting it out. Call you {{3}}.

name: visit_reminder
body_text: Reminder: family dinner on {{1}} at {{2}}. Looking forward to it.

name: painting_class_notice
body_text: Hi {{1}}, watercolor class is on as usual {{2}} at the studio. All levels welcome.

name: potluck_signup
body_text: Class potluck on {{1}}. Could you bring {{2}}? Reply to confirm.

name: class_session_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, watercolor class is this Sunday at 2pm. We're painting spring florals.

name: pleinair_meetup_invite
body_text: Hi {{1}}, plein-air painting meetup is {{2}}. Bring your kit and we'll find good light.

name: supplies_ready
body_text: Hi {{1}}, the paper and paints for class are in. You can pick up your set at {{2}}.

name: studio_room_change
body_text: Note: this week's class moves to {{1}}. Same time, {{2}}.

name: new_student_welcome
body_text: Welcome to the class, {{1}}. We meet the second Sunday at 2pm. So glad to have you.

name: class_cancellation
body_text: Hi {{1}}, watercolor class is cancelled {{2}}. We'll be back the following week.

name: kids_class_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, children's painting hour is {{2}} at the studio. All little artists welcome.

name: volunteer_thank_you
body_text: Thank you {{1}} for helping set up {{2}}. I could not do this without friends like you.

name: next_subject_vote
body_text: Hi {{1}}, time to vote on next month's subject. Reply with your pick by {{2}}.

name: open_studio_notice
body_text: Maria Watercolors open studio is {{1}}. Bring a friend, paints and tea provided.

name: guest_artist_invite
body_text: Hi {{1}}, join us for an afternoon with {{2}}. Free and open to all painters.

name: newsletter_signup_confirm
body_text: Thanks {{1}}, you're signed up for the Maria Watercolors notes. First one arrives {{2}}.

name: carpool_offer
body_text: Hi {{1}}, I can give you a ride to class {{2}}. Reply if that helps.

name: practice_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, we're working on washes {{2}} this month. Take your time and enjoy it.

name: season_schedule
body_text: Hi {{1}}, the {{2}} class schedule is now posted. Watercolor sessions continue all season.

name: demo_lead_request
body_text: Hi {{1}}, would you be willing to lead the warm-up demo {{2}}? No pressure if not.
